descriptions.text: Thunder in Paradise was an unreleased game based on the TV series featuring Hulk Hogan. It was in development by Software Toolworks.

Thunder in Paradise is an American action-adventure television series from the creators of Baywatch, which stars Hulk Hogan, Chris Lemmon, and Carol Alt. This first-run syndicated TV series originally premiered as a direct-to-video feature film in September 1993, then, through a collaboration between Hogan and the Walt Disney Company, ran for one season, which consisted of 22 episodes, from March 25 until November 27, 1994, before being cancelled. In May 1994, during a taping of WCW Saturday Night, Hogan publicly expressed a desire to return to professional wrestling and hinted that he would no longer be a part of the show. The series was later rebroadcast on the TNT cable network.
